182K175K159K192K160K194K1.06M1305.14M68.71%1.9%
30
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 30 seconds.
+5
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.
6
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 6 sec.

When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
6
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 6 sec.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
-5%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 5%.
+5%
Sparkling Mood
Increases Pet Patronage power by 5%.

149K133K129K178K172K181K942K1305.22M23.38%1.94%
6
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 6 sec.
30
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 30 seconds.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
+5%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 5% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
-5%
The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 5% weaker.

+5%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 5% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
-2
Secret Weapon
Interrupting the Enervating Motif requires 2 fewer effects of control.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
-5%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 5%.
-10%
Strength in Perseverance
Interrupting the Deafening Motif of the Thundering Horn requires 10% less healing.

Secret Weapon
Interrupting the Enervating Motif requires 2 fewer effects of control.
+30%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 30% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.
-5%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 5%.
-5%
The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 5% weaker.
+5%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 5% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
+5%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 5% more healing for 5 seconds.
+10%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 10% for 5 seconds.
